# mifid-ii-ai-mcp
# MiFID II Article 17 algorithmic trading + RTS 6 testing/risk controls + best execution AI compliance for investment firms.

## Install
```bash
pip install mifid-ii-ai-mcp
```

## Auth & Rate Limits
- Free tier: 10 calls/day. No API key required.
- Pro tier (£79/mo): unlimited + signed attestations.
- Enterprise (£1,499/mo): white-label + on-premise.

## Tools (5)

### `classify_algo_strategy(query, api_key)`
Algo trading strategy classification (DEA, HFT, market making)

### `rts_6_testing(query, api_key)`
RTS 6 algo testing + risk-control + circuit-breaker requirements

### `best_execution_audit(query, api_key)`
Best execution policy audit per Article 27

### `market_abuse_overlay(query, api_key)`
MAR Reg (EU) 596/2014 + algo flagging

### `hft_notification(query, api_key)`
HFT notification to home competent authority

## Pairs with
- `meok-attestation-api` — HMAC signing for compliance certs
- `meok-attestation-verify` — public verification

## Maintainer
MEOK AI Labs · hello@meok.ai · https://meok.ai · MIT
